title: Build Real-Time Weather Dashboard

steps.description: Define domain models for weather data and geolocation.
steps.done_condition: Domain models for weather data and geolocation are defined and validated.

steps.description: Create port interfaces for fetching weather data and geolocation.
steps.done_condition: Port interfaces for weather data and geolocation are documented and ready for implementation.

steps.description: Implement secondary adapter for fetching weather data from an external API.
steps.done_condition: Secondary adapter for weather data fetching is implemented and tested.

steps.description: Implement secondary adapter for retrieving user's geolocation data.
steps.done_condition: Secondary adapter for geolocation data retrieval is implemented and tested.

steps.description: Implement primary adapter to render user interface with animated SVG icons.
steps.done_condition: User interface is rendered with animated SVG icons and data from secondary adapters.

steps.description: Implement primary adapter for managing user interactions on the dashboard.
steps.done_condition: User interactions are managed effectively and stored as intended.

steps.description: Develop use case for fetching and presenting weather data based on geolocation.
steps.done_condition: Use case for fetching and presenting weather data through defined ports is implemented and tested.

steps.description: Develop use case for handling user interactions and updates.
steps.done_condition: Use case for managing user interactions is implemented and tested.

steps.description: Wiring all components in the composition root.
steps.done_condition: All adapters and use cases are effectively wired together in the composition root.

steps.description: Implement integration tests for the weather dashboard functionality.
steps.done_condition: Integration tests cover end-to-end functionality of the weather dashboard.

successCriteria: Weather data is accurately fetched and displayed.
User geolocation is correctly utilized for displaying relevant weather information.
User interface is responsive and engaging with animated SVG icons.
